```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(gridExtra)
library(cowplot)
# Read the data

toy_model <- read.csv("data/ice_cream_sales.csv")
```

```{r}
# Plot the data
setwd("../..")

p_association <- ggplot(toy_model, aes(x=Electricity_Usage, y=Ice_Cream_Sales)) +
    geom_point(color="steelblue", alpha=0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(title="Ice Cream Sales vs Electricity Usage", 
         x="Electricity Usage (kWh)", 
         y="Ice Cream Sales") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face="bold", size=16),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14)
    )
    

pdf("plots/ic_association_scatter.pdf", width = 20, height = 12)
print(p_association)
dev.off()
```
